text.tspan: Production LLM apps are CONVENTIONAL software with a probabilistic core.
Lessons from years of agent building, distilled to 12 factors.
6. Launch / pause / resume with simple APIs
11. Trigger from anywhere, meet users where they are
12. Make your agent a stateless reducer
Most agent frameworks abstract too much.
You end up fighting the framework when you need control.
The 12 factors: own the pieces that matter (prompts, context,
control flow, error handling). Use frameworks for plumbing,
